---
title: "stage_9_data_vis"
author: "Shahar Chaikin"
date: "2026-06-08"
output: html_document
---

Load the data

---
title: "stage_9_data_vis"
author: "Shahar Chaikin"
date: "2026-06-08"
output: html_document
---

Load the data

```{r setup_and_data}
# Data manipulation and visualization
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(h3jsr)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(patchwork)
library(maps)

# Turn off the strict spherical geometry engine to ignore duplicate vertices
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)

# Load the model dataset
dataset_for_model = read_rds("./stage_7_models/dataset_for_model.rds")
```

#1) Generate summary_df (Linear Models)

```{r}
# Extract ALL unique, valid species from the dataset
all_species <- dataset_for_model %>%
  filter(!is.na(species_harmonized), species_harmonized != "") %>%
  pull(species_harmonized) %>%
  unique()

total_sp <- length(all_species)
cat("Starting batch processing for", total_sp, "species...\n")

# Create the output directory
lm_out_dir <- "./stage_8_proof_of_con/lm_plots_all"
dir.create(lm_out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Initialize a list to hold the data for the CSV
results_list <- list()

# Execution Loop
for (i in seq_along(all_species)) {
  
  sp <- all_species[i]
  
  # A. Filter and prep data
  sp_data <- dataset_for_model %>%
    filter(species_harmonized == sp) %>%
    drop_na(thermal_pos_index, slope, total_sampled_years) %>%
    filter(total_sampled_years > 1) 
  
  if (nrow(sp_data) < 3) {
    cat(sprintf("[%d/%d] SKIPPED (n=%d): %s\n", i, total_sp, nrow(sp_data), sp))
    next
  }

  # Extract Ecosystem to determine ribbon color
  sp_eco <- as.character(sp_data$Eco[1])
  ribbon_color <- ifelse(sp_eco == "Mar", "dodgerblue", "forestgreen")
  
  # Calculate Mean Range Shift Velocity (Rate)
  sp_mean_rate <- mean(sp_data$Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
  rate_label <- ifelse(
    is.nan(sp_mean_rate), 
    "Shift: NA", 
    paste0("Shift: ", round(sp_mean_rate, 2), " km/yr")
  )
  
  # B. Run the model safely using tryCatch
  model_success <- tryCatch({
    sp_lm <- lm(slope ~ thermal_pos_index, data = sp_data, weights = log(total_sampled_years))
    TRUE
  }, error = function(e) {
    FALSE
  })
  
  if (!model_success) {
    cat(sprintf("[%d/%d] FAILED (Math Error): %s\n", i, total_sp, sp))
    
    # Record failed models in the CSV as NA
    results_list[[i]] <- tibble(
      species = sp, ecosystem = sp_eco, mean_rate = sp_mean_rate, 
      n_populations = nrow(sp_data), slope_value = NA, p_value = NA
    )
    next
  }
  
  # C. Extract P-Value and Slope
  coef_table <- summary(sp_lm)$coefficients
  if (nrow(coef_table) > 1) {
    slope_val <- coef_table[2, 1] # Extract the actual slope estimate
    p_val_raw <- coef_table[2, 4]
    p_label <- ifelse(p_val_raw < 0.001, "p < 0.001", paste0("p = ", round(p_val_raw, 3)))
  } else {
    slope_val <- NA
    p_val_raw <- NA
    p_label <- "p = NA"
  }
  
  # Append data to results list for the CSV
  results_list[[i]] <- tibble(
    species = sp,
    ecosystem = sp_eco,
    mean_rate = sp_mean_rate,
    n_populations = nrow(sp_data),
    slope_value = slope_val,
    p_value = p_val_raw
  )
  
  # D. Extract Predictions and Bind
  predictions <- predict(sp_lm, interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
  sp_data <- bind_cols(sp_data, as_tibble(predictions))
  
  # E. Build the Scatter Plot
  p_lm <- ggplot(data = sp_data, aes(x = thermal_pos_index)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(aes(y = slope, size = total_sampled_years), shape = 21, fill = "grey70", color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +
    
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), fill = ribbon_color, alpha = 0.35) +
    geom_line(aes(y = fit), color = "black", linewidth = 1.2) +
    
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Weighted Thermal Response:", sp),
      subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(sp_data), " pops | ", p_label, " | ", rate_label),
      x = "Thermal position",
      y = "Slope (annual population change)"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 14),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  # F. Export
  safe_filename <- paste0(gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", sp), "_lm_plot.pdf")
  save_path <- file.path(lm_out_dir, safe_filename)
  
  suppressMessages({
    ggsave(filename = save_path, plot = p_lm, width = 7, height = 5, device = "pdf")
  })
  
  cat(sprintf("[%d/%d] SAVED: %s\n", i, total_sp, sp))
}

# Compile and Save the CSV
cat("\nPlotting complete. Compiling summary statistics...\n")
summary_df <- bind_rows(results_list)

# Define path for CSV export
csv_out_path <- "./stage_8_proof_of_con/species_lm_summary.csv"
write_csv(summary_df, csv_out_path)

cat("Summary statistics saved to:", csv_out_path, "\n")
```

#2) Map negative associations
```{r}
# 1. Load the summary CSV and filter for significant (p < 0.05) negative slopes
summary_df <- read_csv("./stage_8_proof_of_con/species_lm_summary.csv")

target_species <- summary_df %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.05, slope_value < 0) %>%
  pull(species)

cat("Found", length(target_species), "species with significant negative slopes.\n")

# 2. REBUILD SPATIAL DATA FOR ALL TARGET SPECIES
map_data_all <- dataset_for_model %>%
  filter(species_harmonized %in% target_species) %>%
  drop_na(h3_id, thermal_pos_index) %>% 
  filter(h3_id != "") %>%
  mutate(plot_thermal_pos = pmin(pmax(thermal_pos_index, -1), 1)) %>%
  group_by(species_harmonized, h3_id) %>%
  summarise(
    hex_thermal_pos = mean(plot_thermal_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

map_data_all$geometry <- cell_to_polygon(map_data_all$h3_id, simple = TRUE)
hex_sf_all <- st_as_sf(map_data_all, crs = 4326)

# 3. Create the output directory
map_out_dir <- "./stage_8_proof_of_con/significant_negative_maps"
dir.create(map_out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 4. Base Map Preparation
world_sf <- st_as_sf(maps::map("world", plot = FALSE, fill = TRUE))
world_sf <- st_make_valid(world_sf)

# 5. Map Generation Loop
for (sp in target_species) {
  
  # A. Filter spatial data and CLEAN GEOMETRY to prevent graphics crash
  sp_data <- hex_sf_all %>% 
    filter(species_harmonized == sp) %>%
    st_make_valid() %>% 
    st_buffer(dist = 0) # This forces sf to repair self-intersecting polygon borders
  
  if (nrow(sp_data) == 0) {
    cat("Skipping", sp, "- no spatial data found.\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Fetch the specific shift rate for this species from the summary CSV
  sp_rate <- summary_df %>% 
    filter(species == sp) %>% 
    pull(mean_rate)
  
  # B. Calculate the dynamic center of the species range
  centroid <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(st_union(sp_data)))
  lon_0 <- centroid[1, "X"]
  lat_0 <- centroid[1, "Y"]
  
  dynamic_ortho <- paste0("+proj=ortho +lon_0=", lon_0, " +lat_0=", lat_0)
  
  # C. Calculate dynamic zoom limits in meters
  sp_proj <- st_transform(sp_data, crs = dynamic_ortho)
  bx <- st_bbox(sp_proj)
  
  x_range <- bx["xmax"] - bx["xmin"]
  y_range <- bx["ymax"] - bx["ymin"]
  
  buffer_x <- max(x_range * 0.2, 500000) 
  buffer_y <- max(y_range * 0.2, 500000)
  
  # D. Build and Export the Plot safely
  safe_filename <- paste0(gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", sp), "_map.pdf")
  save_path <- file.path(map_out_dir, safe_filename)
  
  # Use tryCatch so a graphics crash doesn't kill the whole loop
  tryCatch({
    p_map <- ggplot() +
      geom_sf(data = world_sf, fill = "grey90", color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
      geom_sf(data = sp_data, aes(fill = hex_thermal_pos), color = "black", linewidth = 0.15, alpha = 0.9) +
      
      scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#3182bd", mid = "grey85", high = "#de2d26", midpoint = 0,
                           limits = c(-1, 1), name = "Thermal\nPosition") +
      
      coord_sf(
        crs = dynamic_ortho, 
        default_crs = dynamic_ortho, 
        xlim = c(bx["xmin"] - buffer_x, bx["xmax"] + buffer_x), 
        ylim = c(bx["ymin"] - buffer_y, bx["ymax"] + buffer_y), 
        expand = FALSE
      ) +
      
      theme_bw() + 
      labs(
        title = sp,
        subtitle = paste0("Mean range shift velocity: ", round(sp_rate, 2), " km/yr")
      ) +
      theme(
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey70", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold.italic")
      )
    
    suppressMessages({
      ggsave(filename = save_path, plot = p_map, width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white", device=cairo_pdf)
    })
    
    cat("Exported map for:", sp, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    while (!is.null(dev.list())) dev.off()
    cat("GRAPHICS ERROR - Skipped:", sp, "\n")
  })
}

cat("\nAll significant maps processed.\n")
```

#3) Map candidates (World Globe)
```{r}
# 1. Define the specific 3 species you want for this map
target_hub_species <- c("Turdus merula", "Homarus americanus", "Oncorhynchus tshawytscha")

# Build the spatial data directly from the raw dataset to guarantee all 3 are present
map_data <- dataset_for_model %>%
  filter(species_harmonized %in% target_hub_species) %>%
  drop_na(h3_id, thermal_pos_index) %>% 
  filter(h3_id != "") %>%
  mutate(plot_thermal_pos = pmin(pmax(thermal_pos_index, -1), 1)) %>%
  group_by(species_harmonized, h3_id) %>%
  summarise(hex_thermal_pos = mean(plot_thermal_pos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Convert to sf object
map_data$geometry <- cell_to_polygon(map_data$h3_id, simple = TRUE)
hex_sf_filtered <- st_as_sf(map_data, crs = 4326)

# 2. Base Map
world_sf <- st_as_sf(maps::map("world", plot = FALSE, fill = TRUE))
world_sf <- st_make_valid(world_sf)

# 3. Generate Bounding Boxes (Width Heuristic)
bbox_list <- list()

for (sp in unique(hex_sf_filtered$species_harmonized)) {
  sp_data <- hex_sf_filtered %>% filter(species_harmonized == sp)
  
  if (nrow(sp_data) > 0) {
    bx <- st_bbox(sp_data)
    width <- bx["xmax"] - bx["xmin"]
    
    if (width > 150) {
      # Split by Centroid
      centroids <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(sp_data))[, 1]
      west_pac <- sp_data[centroids > 0, ]
      east_pac <- sp_data[centroids <= 0, ]
      
      if (nrow(west_pac) >= 5) {
        bx_w <- st_bbox(west_pac)
        coords_w <- matrix(c(bx_w["xmin"]-5, bx_w["ymin"]-5, bx_w["xmax"]+5, bx_w["ymin"]-5,
                             bx_w["xmax"]+5, bx_w["ymax"]+5, bx_w["xmin"]-5, bx_w["ymax"]+5,
                             bx_w["xmin"]-5, bx_w["ymin"]-5), ncol=2, byrow=TRUE)
        bbox_list[[paste0(sp, "_w")]] <- st_polygon(list(coords_w)) %>% st_sfc(crs = 4326) %>% st_sf(species = sp)
      }
      
      if (nrow(east_pac) >= 5) {
        bx_e <- st_bbox(east_pac)
        coords_e <- matrix(c(bx_e["xmin"]-5, bx_e["ymin"]-5, bx_e["xmax"]+5, bx_e["ymin"]-5,
                             bx_e["xmax"]+5, bx_e["ymax"]+5, bx_e["xmin"]-5, bx_e["ymax"]+5,
                             bx_e["xmin"]-5, bx_e["ymin"]-5), ncol=2, byrow=TRUE)
        bbox_list[[paste0(sp, "_e")]] <- st_polygon(list(coords_e)) %>% st_sfc(crs = 4326) %>% st_sf(species = sp)
      }
      
    } else {
      coords_s <- matrix(c(bx["xmin"]-5, bx["ymin"]-5, bx["xmax"]+5, bx["ymin"]-5,
                           bx["xmax"]+5, bx["ymax"]+5, bx["xmin"]-5, bx["ymax"]+5,
                           bx["xmin"]-5, bx["ymin"]-5), ncol=2, byrow=TRUE)
      bbox_list[[sp]] <- st_polygon(list(coords_s)) %>% st_sfc(crs = 4326) %>% st_sf(species = sp)
    }
  }
}
boxes_sf <- bind_rows(bbox_list)

# Define the projection explicitly
my_ortho <- "+proj=ortho +lon_0=-90 +lat_0=60"

# 4. Build the Globe View
p_globe <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world_sf, fill = "grey90", color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
  geom_sf(data = hex_sf_filtered, aes(fill = hex_thermal_pos), color = "black", linewidth = 0.05, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_sf(data = boxes_sf, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#3182bd", mid = "grey85", high = "#de2d26", midpoint = 0,
                       limits = c(-1, 1), name = "Thermal\nPosition") +
  
  coord_sf(
    crs = my_ortho, 
    default_crs = my_ortho, 
    xlim = c(-6000000, 6000000), 
    ylim = c(-3000000, 5000000), 
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey70", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(p_globe)

# Export using the cairo_pdf device
ggsave(
  "./stage_8_proof_of_con/Global_Globe_View_Fixed.pdf", 
  plot = p_globe, 
  width = 8, 
  height = 8, 
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```

#4) Plot candidates (Specific LM Plots)
```{r}
# 1. Define the 3 specific target species
target_species <- c("Turdus merula", "Homarus americanus", "Oncorhynchus tshawytscha")

# 2. Create the output directory
lm_specific_dir <- "./stage_8_proof_of_con/lm_specific_plots"
dir.create(lm_specific_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 3. Execution Loop
for (sp in target_species) {
  
  # A. Filter and prep data
  sp_data <- dataset_for_model %>%
    filter(species_harmonized == sp) %>%
    drop_na(thermal_pos_index, slope, total_sampled_years) %>%
    filter(total_sampled_years > 1) 
  
  if (nrow(sp_data) < 3) {
    cat("Skipping", sp, "- insufficient data points.\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Extract Ecosystem for ribbon color
  sp_eco <- as.character(sp_data$Eco[1])
  ribbon_color <- ifelse(sp_eco == "Mar", "dodgerblue", "forestgreen")
  
  # Calculate Shift Rate
  sp_mean_rate <- mean(sp_data$Rate, na.rm = TRUE)
  rate_label <- ifelse(
    is.nan(sp_mean_rate), 
    "NA", 
    paste0(round(sp_mean_rate, 2), " km/yr")
  )
  
  # B. Run the linear model
  sp_lm <- tryCatch({
    lm(slope ~ thermal_pos_index, data = sp_data, weights = log(total_sampled_years))
  }, error = function(e) { NULL })
  
  if (is.null(sp_lm)) next
  
  # C. Extract P-Value
  coef_table <- summary(sp_lm)$coefficients
  if (nrow(coef_table) > 1) {
    p_val_raw <- coef_table[2, 4]
    p_label <- ifelse(p_val_raw < 0.001, "p < 0.001", paste0("p = ", round(p_val_raw, 3)))
  } else {
    p_label <- "p = NA"
  }
  
  # D. Extract Predictions and Bind
  predictions <- predict(sp_lm, interval = "confidence", level = 0.95)
  sp_data <- bind_cols(sp_data, as_tibble(predictions))
  
  # E. Build the unified title
  plot_title <- paste(sp, "| n =", nrow(sp_data), "|", p_label, "|", rate_label)
  
  # F. Build the Scatter Plot
  p_lm <- ggplot(data = sp_data, aes(x = thermal_pos_index)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey20", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(aes(y = slope, size = total_sampled_years), shape = 21, fill = "grey70", color = "black", alpha = 0.6) +
    
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lwr, ymax = upr), fill = ribbon_color, alpha = 0.35) +
    geom_line(aes(y = fit), color = "black", linewidth = 1.2) +
    
    theme_classic() +
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      x = "Thermal position",
      y = "Slope (annual population change)",
      size = "Sampled Years"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold.italic", size = 13),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      legend.position = c(0.98, 0.98), 
      legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.3),
      legend.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 6, b = 4, l = 6)
    )
  
  # G. Export
  safe_filename <- paste0(gsub("[^[:alnum:]]", "_", sp), "_specific_lm.pdf")
  save_path <- file.path(lm_specific_dir, safe_filename)
  
  suppressMessages({
    ggsave(filename = save_path, plot = p_lm, width = 7, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
  })
  
  cat("Exported specific LM plot for:", sp, "\n")
}
```
